text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen hasn't shown up for training
today, so I decide to go looking for her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My megaphone is ready to go! Now, to the
baseball stadium!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Trainer, what a surprise. I was just on my
way out.
choice_data_list: Did you forget about your training?
Did you forget about your training?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
O-o-oh nooo... I, of all people! I've been thinking
so much about the consecutive hits record that I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
choice_data_list: Just be more careful next time.
Just be more careful next time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I shall practice self-discipline and recover
from this blunder!
